title: ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Adult Outpatient services work with adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, couples, family, and group therapy that focuses on wellness recovery, solution-focused plans, cognitive and dialectical issues, substance use disorder, and Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder. 2210 Eldorado Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 883-1030 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Offering same day access for intake, screening, and comprehensive evaluations. Walk in or call for more information. FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees also available. No one turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Mandarin, Portuguese, German, ASL, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Geriatric Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO
